query:
SELECT 
  ae.id,
  ae.worker_id,
  w.manual_code as worker_code,
  w.full_name as worker_name,
  w.group_id,
  g.name as group_name,
  ae.event_type,
  ae.event_time
FROM attendance_events ae
LEFT JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON w.group_id = g.id
WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY w.id, ae.event_time;
command:

  ae.id,
  ae.worker_id,
  w.manual_code as worker_code,
  w.full_name as worker_name,
  w.group_id,
  g.name as group_name,
  ae.event_type,
  ae.event_time
FROM attendance_events ae
LEFT JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON w.group_id = g.id
WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-07'
ORDER BY w.id, ae.event_time;
